About Me

Engineer · Educator · Researcher · Open to Internship

2+ yrs tutoring  ·  3 active roles  ·  1 university

Materials Science & Engineering student at RUET with two years of hands-on experience in engineering design, lab-based problem solving, and team leadership. I also tutor Math, Physics, and Chemistry — which has sharpened my ability to communicate complex ideas clearly across any audience. I'm seeking an industry role in materials testing, manufacturing, product development, or quality where I can contribute from day one. Detail-oriented, dependable, and genuinely passionate about turning engineering knowledge into real-world results.

Research Enthusiast

Exploring metals, polymers, and hydrogen energy — keen on R&D and product innovation.

Hydrogen Energy

Passionate about hydrogen as a clean fuel — from storage to real-world applications.

Passionate Educator

2+ years tutoring HSC students in Physics, Chemistry & Math with a results-focused approach.

Engineering Design

Proficient in AutoCAD, SolidWorks & MATLAB — bridging theory with practical design.

Team Leadership

Active in RUET Materials Club, Debating Club & SCADR — leading with initiative.

Projects / Research

Areas of interest

3 focus areas  ·  Materials · Energy · Mechanics

Hydrogen Energy & Storage

Investigating hydrogen as a clean and sustainable energy carrier, with a focus on advanced storage methods including metal hydrides, chemical hydrogen storage, and nanomaterial-based solutions for safe and efficient storage.

Advanced Engineering Materials

Exploring research opportunities in metals, polymers, and advanced engineering materials for next-generation applications.

Case Study on Fracture

Conducted an in-depth case study on fracture mechanics (Semester 2-2), exploring failure analysis, crack propagation, and material behavior under stress.

Tuition Services

Expert coaching for HSC Physics, Chemistry & Mathematics

3 subjects  ·  2+ yrs experience  ·  Flexible schedule

Available for Tutoring

HSC Physics, Chemistry & Mathematics

Providing focused, result-oriented tutoring for HSC level students. Building strong conceptual foundations with personalized attention and structured learning plans in Physics, Chemistry, and Mathematics to help students excel in their board exams.

  • HSC Physics — concept clarity & problem solving
  • HSC Chemistry — reactions, theory & numericals
  • HSC Mathematics — step-by-step approach
  • Personalized attention & flexible schedule
  • Exam preparation & practice sessions
